title: dobrunia-liverail-client
summary: Client runtime for typed commands, subscriptions and reconnect-safe event flow.

sections.title: Client Runtime
sections.summary: Create a typed client runtime around the shared contract registry.

sections.title: Command API
sections.summary: Execute commands with validation, timeout handling and normalized failures.

sections.title: Subscriptions and Events
sections.summary: Subscribe to channel instances and handle validated inbound events.

sections.title: Reconnect and State Updates
sections.summary: Keep subscriptions and event appliers stable across reconnect and transport changes.

bestPractices: Build the runtime from contracts first and then plug in a transport implementation.
Use event appliers for state transitions before listener-specific side effects.
Listen to lifecycle and system events instead of inferring transport state manually.
